title: olfersia lineata
intro: Olfersia lineata, also known as the lined orchid or grass orchid, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is believed to have various health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Olfersia lineata are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties. Additionally, the plant's leaves and roots have been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including skin infections and digestive issues.
